S.FORM: == qwo trakis == trakis hiya ga, skbalay nha qwo. qwo kinalay na trakis hiya ga, spyang balay blaq nbun.
S.PHON: == qwo trakis~ɕ == trakis~ɕ ħija ɣa, s~ɕkβalaj nħa qwo. qwo kinalaj na trakis~ɕ ħija ɣa, s~ɕpjaŋ βalaj βlaq nβun.
S.FORM: == qwo trakis == trakis hiya ga, skbalay nha qwo. qwo kinalay na trakis hiya ga, spyang balay blaq nbun.
S.PHON: == qwo trakis~ɕ == trakis~ɕ ħija ɣa, s~ɕkβalaj nħa qwo. qwo kinalaj na trakis~ɕ ħija ɣa, s~ɕpjaŋ βalaj βlaq nβun.
